'''âg-g-s-g''' ('''kagagsegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:orchidectomise|orchidectomise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:orchidectomise|orchidectomise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-g-s-g
|-
! Lemma
| kagagsegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigagsegoko|thigagsegoko]] || [[word:jigagsegoko|jigagsegoko]] || [[word:shigagsegoko|shigagsegoko]] || [[word:kigagsegoko|kigagsegoko]]
|-

|-
